summary: Completed testing of MKEpulse Phase 2 features. Backend APIs all working correctly (23/23 tests passed). Frontend has authentication integration issues preventing full UI testing.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login form not successfully authenticating users - 401 errors on API calls
integration_issues.details: Backend authentication APIs work correctly via curl/direct testing, but frontend login form fails to authenticate. Likely CORS or environment variable configuration issue.

passed_tests: Geo Update (Free User) - correctly returns pro_required
Geo Update (Pro User) - correctly returns 7 proximity alerts
Stripe Checkout - successfully creates checkout session
Stripe Subscription Status - correctly returns tier info
All Phase 2 backend features working correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 0% (unable to test due to auth issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication integration. Backend APIs are working correctly but frontend login form is not successfully authenticating users. Check CORS configuration, environment variables, and frontend-backend API integration. All Phase 2 backend features (geo proximity alerts, Stripe checkout, subscription status) are working correctly.
